name: superleads
description: Foreign-trade customer discovery Skill Suite with public signals and optional deep verification.

interface.shortDescription: Overseas customer discovery and optional verification.
interface.longDescription: Superleads is a general-purpose foreign-trade Skill Suite for discovery-first overseas candidate pools, public contact organization, and user-requested deep verification without hard-coded industry ICP defaults.
defaultPrompt: Use Superleads to find overseas buyers for my product and target market.
Use Superleads to enrich this customer list with sourced contacts.
Use Superleads to audit these lead sources before delivery.
